subcodes.first_line: O thou who treadest the path of divine guidance! A hundred thousand guides have appeared in the world, each claiming to be the source of righteousness, prosperity and detachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالک سبیل رشاد صد هزار مرشد در جهان پدیدار شد هر یک مدعی رشد و فلاح و زهد و
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
